qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.d_interfaz as INTERFACE, t.oi_banco as ID, t.c_banco as CODE, t.d_banco as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM LIQ22_BANCOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Bancos.BANCO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_banco LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_banco={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.d_interfaz as INTERFACE, t.oi_banco as ID, t.c_banco as CODE, t.d_banco as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM LIQ22_BANCOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Bancos.BANCO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_banco LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_banco={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.d_interfaz as INTERFACE, t.oi_banco as ID, t.c_banco as CODE, t.d_banco as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM LIQ22_BANCOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Bancos.BANCO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_banco LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW
